data.body: DESIGN-FEEDBACK EVALUATION + fixes (Joe's per-finding directives). APPLIED to epic 5fd2: T8 validated Pass-2 vocab added (attrs none/low/med/high, local/module/system, low/med/high, easy/mod/hard; binary yes/no/insufficient + cited_reference_accurate veto); T12 reframed as a config PREFERENCE (defaults OFF, rollback=turn off, NOT a kill-switch); G6 fixed the FALSE 'only DET blocks' -> LLM tiers also block on threshold config (advisory by default during calibration); E6 added an end-to-end proving-check AC (happy + edge cases); T2/T5a replaced benchmark-step with a passive logging/instrumentation AC (initial targets from UX/timeout, refine from dogfood data). db7b sidecar: added a retention/cleanup path that preserves passive gathering. criteria_v8: T5c security prompt refit (domain-appropriate; no already-in-repo leakage). Commits f06f8eb6 (T5c). META-THEME: T5c/G6/T2-T5a were FALSE POSITIVES the FILTER (Pass-2 entailment + Pass-3 impact-floor) should have excluded (domain-inappropriate / debatable-misinterpretation / low-impact) — review-process failings, not epic defects. PROPOSAL: seed the eval suite with THIS re-run's FPs as labeled false-fires to calibrate the filter; experiment T5c single-turn-vs-agent for security-model grounding. EXPLAINED: idempotency (attestation idempotent on re-run / sidecar intentionally append-only), deploy-ordering (new REVIEW_RESULT event = preserve-and-ignore by older clones, rebar's existing TAG_DELTA rollout convention), prompt-cache (round-3 cost default: cache the system+plan prefix across chunk calls).
